payload.label: fan
payload.long_description: Partial ceiling fan with five glossy brown wooden blades, a central cream/opal glass dome light and visible metallic motor housing; blades are slightly curved and cropped by the image edges, the dome shows minor discoloration, and the crop appears low-resolution/compressed — estimated distance from camera ~3.0 m.
